today_news.title: ElevenLabs and Google dominate Artificial Analysis' updated speech-to-text benchmark
today_news.summary: ElevenLabs and Google are neck and neck in the race for the best speech recognition. A new benchmark shows who comes out on top.

today_news.title: The Pentagon-OpenAI-Anthropic fallout comes down to three words: "all lawful use"
today_news.summary: After signing a deal with the Department of War, OpenAI tries to build trust by publishing the contract details. So far, it's not working.

today_news.title: AI can link fake online names to real identities in minutes for just a few dollars
today_news.summary: Researchers from ETH Zurich and Anthropic demonstrate that pseudonymous internet users can be identified using commercially available AI models for just a few dollars per person. The results call into question fundamental assumptions about online anonymity.

today_news.title: Moltbook's alleged AI civilization is just a massive void of bloated bot traffic
today_news.summary: Over 2.6 million AI agents interact on Moltbook with zero human involvement. They post, comment, and vote, but a new study shows they never learn from each other. It's hollow interaction without mutual influence, shared memory, or social structures, a new study finds.

today_tech.title: HumanMCP: A Human-Like Query Dataset for Evaluating MCP Tool Retrieval Performance
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers contain a collection of thousands of open-source standardized tools, linking LLMs to external systems; however, existing datasets and benchmarks lack realistic, human-like user queries, remaining a critical gap in evaluating the tool usage and ecosystem...

today_tech.title: An Empirical Analysis of Task-Induced Encoder Bias in Fr\'echet Audio Distance
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Fr\'echet Audio Distance (FAD) is the de facto standard for evaluating text-to-audio generation, yet its scores depend on the underlying encoder's embedding space. An encoder's training task dictates which acoustic features are preserved or discarded, causing FAD to inherit systematic task...

today_tech.title: DashengTokenizer: One layer is enough for unified audio understanding and generation
today_tech.summary: Abstract: This paper introduces DashengTokenizer, a continuous audio tokenizer engineered for joint use in both understanding and generation tasks. Unlike conventional approaches, which train acoustic tokenizers and subsequently integrate frozen semantic knowledge, our method inverts this paradigm: ...

today_tech.title: Task-Lens: Cross-Task Utility Based Speech Dataset Profiling for Low-Resource Indian Languages
today_tech.summary: Abstract: The rising demand for inclusive speech technologies amplifies the need for multilingual datasets for Natural Language Processing (NLP) research. However, limited awareness of existing task-specific resources in low-resource languages hinders research. This challenge is especially acute in ...

today_tech.title: Modelling and Simulation of Neuromorphic Datasets for Anomaly Detection in Computer Vision
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Limitations on the availability of Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS) present a fundamental challenge to researchers of neuromorphic computer vision applications.
